name: io.github.bruno-portfolio/hypokrates
title: hypokrates
description: Pharmacovigilance hypothesis generation — cross-references 15 global drug safety databases (FAERS, JADER, Canada Vigilance, PubMed, DailyMed, DrugBank, OpenTargets, ChEMBL, OnSIDES, PharmGKB) via 44 MCP tools

environmentVariables.name: OPENFDA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenFDA API key (raises rate limit from 40 to 240 req/min)

environmentVariables.name: NCBI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: NCBI/PubMed API key (raises rate limit from 180 to 600 req/min)
